194 F0500H_RLGN_CD F0500H_RLGN_CD F0500H Interview for Activity Preferences: Religion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they participate in religious services or practices while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no choice
9=No response or
